creator: Democracy Now!
description: * Headlines for May 17, 2007 * Gaza Is Burning: Laila El-Hadded Reports on How Recent Fighting in Gaza has Paralyzed Civilian Life * "Untapped: The Scramble for Africa's Oil" * War Resister Agustin Aguayo Speaks Out After his Release from Military Prison for Refusing to Fight in Iraq * Headlines for May 18, 2007 * Citing Racist Bias, Attorneys for Mumia Abu-Jamal Urge a Federal Appeals Court to Grant the Former Black Panther a New Trial * George Monbiot: "If We Don’t Deal with Climate Change We Condemn Hundreds of Millions of People to Death" * Immigrant Rights Groups Condemn New Senate Proposal to Overhaul Nation's Immigration Laws
title: Democracy Now! Monday, May 21, 2007
